title: Animated Items
description: A resourcepack dedicated to bringing Minecraft alive through animations in blocks and items!
body:
---
Animated Items aims to deliver animations to otherwise completely
static items and blocks throughout the game.
History **Animated Items** In it's inception was nothing more than a learning journey for me as I learned how to make resourcepacks for **Minecraft**.
As I began my learning journey, I was becoming comfortable enough to share what I had made with the world, so I began uploading my resourcepack to **Curseforge** and **Planet Minecraft** on March 17th 2020.
I was mesmorised by how you could customize any part of the game, and so as I learned how to do the all so many things of resourcepacks, I began adding them and publically releasing them into **Animated Items**, though they never made sense.
Eventually I removed these features because **Animated Items** is a resourcepack about animations, so I took away the bells and whistles, and prioritized the theme of animation.
Since then, I've been making improvements and updates on **Modrinth**.
**Special Thanks to Otter Lover!**
